Aphids.symptoms: Leaves turn yellow and curl downwards. Sticky honeydew on leaves.
Aphids.chemical_remedy: Spray Imidacloprid 17.8% SL at 1 ml/Liter of water.
Aphids.organic_remedy: Spray Neem Oil (10,000 ppm) at 3-5 ml/Liter with mild soap.

Termites.symptoms: Plants dry up completely from the base. Roots are eaten.
Termites.chemical_remedy: Seed treatment with Chlorpyriphos 20 EC before sowing.
Termites.organic_remedy: Apply well-decomposed farmyard manure mixed with Trichoderma.

Pink Bollworm.symptoms: Flowers fail to open (rosette flower). Holes in bolls.
Pink Bollworm.chemical_remedy: Spray Quinalphos 25 EC or Thiodicarb 75 WP.
Pink Bollworm.organic_remedy: Install Pheromone traps (5 per acre) to catch adult moths.

Stem Borer.symptoms: Central shoot dries up (dead heart) in vegetative stage.
